tasks.label: Fresh Frontend Install
tasks.command: Set-Location frontend; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Force package-lock.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; npm install --force

tasks.label: Clean Install Frontend
tasks.command: Set-Location c:\Users\OMC\isp-erp-system\frontend; if (Test-Path node_modules) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force node_modules }; if (Test-Path package-lock.json) { Remove-Item -Force package-lock.json }; npm install --force
